Hero.subtitle: Post any errand or task — a verified runner in your city picks it up. Fast, safe, and community-powered.
Hero.cardTitle: Pick up flowers in Toronto for my mom 💐

HowItWorks.desc: No phone calls, no hunting for contacts. Post once, get offers from verified runners nearby.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Describe what you need, where, and your budget. Free to post — takes under 2 minutes.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Nearby runners see your task and send offers. You pick the one you like best.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Your runner completes the task. Payment releases only when you're satisfied.

PriceGuide.desc: Typical prices for the most popular tasks on Runly. You set your own budget — runners bid competitively.
PriceGuide.disclaimer: Prices are typical ranges based on completed tasks. Final price depends on your location and task details.

Trust.p1Desc: Funds are held safely until the task is done and you're satisfied. You never pay for incomplete work.
Trust.p2Desc: Every runner is reviewed by the community, rated after each task, and can be reported instantly.
Trust.p3Desc: Thousands of honest reviews from real Canadians in your city — no fake testimonials, ever.

EarnMoney.desc: Runners on Runly average $400–600/week picking up tasks nearby. No boss, no minimum hours, no commute.
EarnMoney.b1: Work only when you want to

Testimonials.q1: I sent birthday flowers to my sister in Vancouver without leaving Hamilton. Runly made it so easy.
Testimonials.q2: I make $400–600 extra per week just picking up tasks around Toronto on my days off. Best side income I've found.
Testimonials.q3: Found someone to pick up my parcel from across the city in under an hour. Completely changed how I handle errands.

FAQ.q1: How much does it cost to post a task?
FAQ.a1: Posting a task on Runly is completely free. You only pay when a runner accepts your task and completes it. You set your own budget — runners bid and you choose the offer that works for you.
FAQ.a2: Yes. Runly is live in Toronto, Hamilton, Vancouver, Ottawa, Calgary, Mississauga, Brampton, Edmonton, and growing. If you don't see your city yet, post a task anyway — we're expanding fast.
FAQ.q3: How do I know the runner is trustworthy?
FAQ.a3: Every runner on Runly completes identity verification before their first task. You can also see their rating, completed task count, and public reviews before you accept their bid.
FAQ.q4: When does the runner get paid?
FAQ.a4: Payment is held securely by Runly until you confirm the task is done. The runner only receives payment after you mark the task as complete — so you're always protected.
FAQ.q5: What kinds of tasks can I post?
FAQ.a5: Almost anything: parcel pickup and delivery, grocery shopping, sending gifts, home assembly, dog walking, airport drop-offs, admin errands, and more. If it's legal and local, you can post it.
FAQ.q6: How quickly can a runner start my task?
FAQ.a6: Most tasks in active cities receive bids within 15–30 minutes. Same-day completion is common for delivery and shopping tasks. You control the schedule — set a time that works for you.

FinalCTA.desc: Join thousands of Canadians who trust Runly to handle their everyday tasks.

Footer.tagline: Canada's community-powered task marketplace. Get it done by someone nearby.
